summary: Adjusted the chapter entry to pick up directly from Chapter 14's final turn toward the kitchens and established Owen's satchel so Chapter 16's undercroft continuation lands cleanly.
edits: Rewrote the opening movement beat so Owen starts just after turning right at the round door instead of re-crossing the common room.
Established Owen's satchel in the opening to support the immediate Chapter 16 carry-through.
